name: Alabama Forestry Commission
notes: AlabamaForestryCommission has no AGOL items. Largest AL tree find is Univ of N Alabama campus inventory (37,025 trees, owner=UNA_Facilities) — CAMPUS only, not state. No state-level aggregator.

name: Alaska Division of Forestry & Fire Protection
notes: No state-level community-tree inventory found on ArcGIS Online. Top hits were ranged-vegetation Tongass NF Trees-Per-Acre Map Services (not tree-point inventory).

name: Arizona Department of Forestry and Fire Management
notes: AZ Dept of Forestry & Fire Management does not publish a statewide tree inventory. Major AZ cities (Mesa 33k, Tempe 26k) have their own AGOL feature services.

name: Arkansas Department of Agriculture — Forestry Division
notes: No state-level community tree inventory found. Arkansas Dept of Agriculture Forestry Division does not publish ArcGIS tree-point aggregator.

name: CAL FIRE / California Urban Forestry Program
notes: CAL FIRE does not publish a statewide community-tree-point inventory on ArcGIS. CA Urban Forestry Program is grant-based. Many CA cities (Palm Springs 15k, LA, SF, San Diego) have individual feeds.

name: Colorado State Forest Service
notes: No state-level aggregator from CSFS found. Major CO cities (Boulder 50k via own portal, Denver, Aurora) publish individually.

name: Connecticut DEEP Forestry Division
notes: CT DEEP Forestry: only TreeCanopy_V2_0 (CIRCA UConn) found — canopy POLYGON not tree points. No state inventory.

name: Delaware Forest Service
notes: DE Forest Service does not publish a state aggregator. CDBG_2024Sites (Delaware Center for Horticulture) is small and not a tree-point inventory.

name: Florida Forest Service
notes: PG-Cloud TreePlotter Florida instance exists but currently shows "app disabled" — login required. Florida Forest Service operates an Urban & Community Forestry Program; no public ArcGIS aggregator found.

name: Georgia Forestry Commission
notes: Georgia Forestry Commission runs PG-Cloud Tree Plotter portal at /Georgia (login-gated). No public ArcGIS state aggregator.

name: Hawaii Division of Forestry and Wildlife
notes: PARTIAL-STATE via USFS Region 5 "Tree Inventory" — Citizen Forester Tree Inventory for parts of Oahu. 18,811 trees. Public. Related to pg-cloud.com/hawaii Tree Plotter. Fields: Common_Nam. Sample in HI bbox. Not run by HI DOFAW directly but covers state.

name: Idaho Department of Lands — Forestry
notes: Idaho Dept of Lands PG-Cloud Tree Plotter at /Idaho (login-gated). No state-level ArcGIS aggregator. Boise has standalone city service.

name: Illinois Department of Natural Resources — Forestry
notes: IL DNR Forestry only publishes Volunteer Tree Inventory Naplate (50 trees, single town). No state aggregator.

name: Indiana DNR Division of Forestry
notes: PARTIAL-STATE AGGREGATOR via IU Environmental Resilience Institute (owner=ugimaps_IU). 387,655 trees across 20 Indiana municipalities incl Bloomington & Indianapolis. Public access. Partner: Davey Resource Group. Fields: SPECIES, GENUS, COMMONNAME. Not run by IN DNR but pools many IN cities.

name: Iowa DNR Forestry Bureau
notes: STATE AGGREGATOR. Iowa DNR Urban Tree Inventory (Andy.Asell_iowadnr). 336k trees across Iowa municipalities. Public access, fields incl SPECIES/COMMONNAME/TOWN/CITYMANAGE. Sample point in IA bbox. Replaces dozens of city-level scrapes.

name: Kansas Forest Service
notes: KFS_GIS only publishes Kansas Tree Cities (87 city-marker points) + Tree Campuses (8) — these are community pins, NOT tree inventories. No state-level tree-point aggregator. Largest KS find: Andover city Street Trees (2,844 trees).

name: Kentucky Division of Forestry
notes: STATE AGGREGATOR. KY Statewide Tree Inventory 1.1 (owner=abe.nielsen_kygis, KY Division of Forestry). 9,945 trees. licenseInfo="Public Access, data sharing encouraged". Fields: Species etc. Sample in KY bbox.

name: Louisiana Department of Agriculture & Forestry
notes: No state-level community-tree inventory found for Louisiana Dept of Ag & Forestry on ArcGIS Online.

name: Maine Forest Service
notes: Maine Forest Service Project Canopy provides grants only; no state ArcGIS aggregator. Ellsworth/Beacon (NY false hit) appear at top but are city-level / out-of-state.

name: Maryland Forest Service
notes: No MD state forestry aggregator. Top scoring "New Maryland..." results are from the village of New Maryland, NEW BRUNSWICK Canada (verified via sample lat=45.9, lng=-66.7). Gaithersburg MD (11.5k) is the largest MD city-level find.

name: Massachusetts DCR Bureau of Forestry
notes: MA DCR Bureau of Forestry: only Legacy Tree Nomination Form found, no state inventory. Cambridge & other cities publish individually.

name: Michigan DNR Forest Resources Division
notes: Michigan DNR Public Forest Inventory is FOREST-STAND polygons (covertype/treatments) not urban trees. FinalTreePoints (1.39M, owner michael.forlenza@nv5.com NV5) appears to be a private consultant dataset — verify ownership before treating as state aggregator.

name: Minnesota DNR Division of Forestry
notes: No MN state aggregator. MnDOT Community Tree Submittal Survey exists. MPRB (Minneapolis Parks) publishes individually.

name: Mississippi Forestry Commission
notes: Mississippi Forestry Commission PG-Cloud Tree Plotter instance exists at /Mississippi (login-gated). No public ArcGIS state aggregator.

name: Missouri Department of Conservation — Forestry
notes: MO Dept of Conservation publishes Forestry Management Areas (polygons) only. Heritage Trees (Independence, MO survey) is 17 points. No state aggregator.

name: Montana DNRC Forestry Division
notes: MT DNRC publishes "Urban_Forestry MFAP" but only 62 point features — these are COMMUNITY-LEVEL summary points (Town_ID, COMMUNITY, ash%/conditions), not individual tree points. No state-level tree-point aggregator found.

name: Nebraska Forest Service
notes: Nebraska Forest Service PG-Cloud Tree Plotter at /Nebraska (login-gated). No public ArcGIS aggregator.

name: Nevada Division of Forestry
notes: NDF (Nevada Division of Forestry) owns three project inventories on AGOL (owner=ndfadmin): UNLV Tree Inventory (3,227) + Clark County Schools Tree Inventory (30,938) + NDF Big Tree Nomination. NOT a true statewide aggregator but only large NDF public tree-point datasets. Also publishes urban-canopy POLYGON layers (Reno/LV/Henderson/Sparks/Carson/N.LV/Pahrump/Lemmon Valley) which are not tree points.

name: New Hampshire Division of Forests and Lands
notes: NH Division of Forests and Lands does not publish a state tree-point aggregator on ArcGIS.

name: New Jersey Forest Service
notes: NJ Forest Service does not publish a state aggregator. Hudson County TreePlantings_Reporter_2015 (small) and city-level only.

name: New Mexico Forestry Division
notes: STATE AGGREGATOR. New Mexico Community Data Collaborative export of Tree Plotter statewide dataset (https://pg-cloud.com/NewMexico/). 12,431 trees. Public AGOL feature service. Fields: CITY, SPECIES_LA, SPECIES_01. May 2019 snapshot — check for newer.

name: New York DEC Division of Lands and Forests
notes: NY DEC does not publish a state community-tree aggregator. NYC publishes Street Tree Census individually (~600k+ trees — separate row). Beacon NY (1,128) is city-level.

name: North Carolina Forest Service
notes: NC Forest Service: only Tree City USA Cities map (city markers) found. No state tree-point aggregator.

name: North Dakota Forest Service
notes: NDFS (grace.ivesdal_ndfs) publishes "Tree Equity Grant Map" (2 polygons) and Community Forestry Grant Management Survey — NO state-level tree-point inventory. pg-cloud.com/SouthDakota and /NorthDakota exist (Tree Plotter) but login-gated.

name: Ohio Division of Forestry
notes: Ohio Division of Forestry does not publish a state aggregator. AudubonInterviewRF "Tree Inventory Public" (5k) appears to be Green Lawn Cemetery in Columbus.

name: Oklahoma Forestry Services
notes: OK Forestry Services (owner=CMask_OKForestry) publishes State Forest Timber Tracts and FIA dashboards only — no urban tree-point aggregator. Top score was actually Utah dataset matching the "OK" search term.

name: Oregon Department of Forestry
notes: Oregon Dept of Forestry PG-Cloud Tree Plotter instance at /Oregon (login-gated). No public ArcGIS state aggregator. Many OR cities (Tualatin 11k, Portland) on AGOL individually.

name: Pennsylvania DCNR Bureau of Forestry
notes: PA DCNR TreeVitalize is grant program; no state tree-point aggregator on ArcGIS. Harrisburg (8.6k via emrubin_COHBG) and DVRPC screening tool are top finds.

name: Rhode Island DEM Division of Forest Environment
notes: RI DEM does not publish a state aggregator on ArcGIS. TreeEquityScore (DOA) is a polygon overlay.

name: South Carolina Forestry Commission
notes: SC Forestry Commission does not publish a state tree-point aggregator on ArcGIS Online.

name: South Dakota Resource Conservation & Forestry
notes: South Dakota Resource Conservation & Forestry PG-Cloud Tree Plotter at /SouthDakota (login-gated). No public ArcGIS state aggregator.

name: Tennessee Division of Forestry
notes: TN Division of Forestry does not publish a state aggregator. Chattanooga TreeCanopy is polygons only.

name: Texas A&M Forest Service
notes: Texas A&M Forest Service does not publish a statewide community-tree-point aggregator on ArcGIS. Austin Downtown Tree Inventory (7.3k), Allen city Trees (10.8k) are city-level.

name: Utah FFSL (Forestry, Fire and State Lands)
notes: Statewide forestry agency for Utah

name: Vermont Department of Forests, Parks and Recreation
notes: STATE AGGREGATOR. Vermont ANR/VT Urban & Community Forestry Program "Municipal Tree Inventory" (owner=vtanrgis). 31,904 trees. Hosted on anrmaps.vermont.gov Open_Data service. Fields: TOWN, SPECIES, GreenspaceName, ATTNAME. Sample in VT bbox.

name: Virginia Department of Forestry
notes: VA Dept of Forestry does not publish a state aggregator. Richmond DPW (brad.duplantis@rva.gov_cor) publishes 121k trees but it is city-level Richmond only.

name: Washington DNR Forest Resources
notes: WA DNR does not publish a state community-tree aggregator. Tacoma Community Trees (201) is small/polygon. Top finds spill to DC + Tacoma.

name: West Virginia Division of Forestry
notes: WV Division of Forestry does not publish a state tree-point aggregator on ArcGIS Online.

name: Wisconsin DNR Division of Forestry
notes: Statewide forestry agency for Wisconsin

name: Wyoming State Forestry Division
notes: STATE AGGREGATOR. Wyoming State Forestry Division (owner=jacob.mares_WSFD) "Community Tree Inventory Data Collection" + Laramie_StreetTrees + Laramie_ParkTrees + Laramie_OtherTrees layers. Public access. Combined ~6k trees. Fields: ProjectName_LocationDescription, CommonName_SciName_SpCode.

name: DC DDOT Urban Forestry Division
notes: Statewide forestry agency for District of Columbia

name: Puerto Rico DRNA Bureau of Forestry
notes: No PR DRNA tree-point aggregator found on ArcGIS Online. Only generic Natural Features Inventory Map (TC_Intern) appears.

name: Houston, TX
notes: IMPORTED. City of Houston HPARD Urban Forestry inventory (owner=e127618_MyCity, 275,648 trees). SPECIES field uses common,modifier form ("Raintree, Golden"); no Latin binomial. Houston open data permits commercial+derivative use with attribution. Augments earlier dryad-trees-houston (14.5k pins) — combined ~57k pins in bbox = 50% coverage.

name: Phoenix, AZ
notes: PHASE-3 OUTREACH. City of Phoenix still does not publish its own per-tree species inventory on AGOL. ASU/GAO research dataset (owner=mkwrigh1_asu, Greg Asner group) covers ~22.5k trees with SPP_BOT/SPP_COM/DBH/HEIGHT/COND inside the GAO flight area — looks like a field-inspected inventory used as GAO classification ground-truth (INSPECT_DT 2011-2017). AGOL Public access but item has no licenseInfo/snippet/description; owner is a research account, not the City. Queue: confirm Phoenix Parks consent + ASU permissions before importing.

name: San Antonio, TX
notes: BLOCKED. TreesSA Feature Service (owner=mikel@urbanecoplan.com / UrbanForestry_CoSAGIS) returns 'Token Required' (HTTP 499). City of San Antonio Urban Forestry uses gated AGOL. Phase 3 outreach: City of SA UrbanForestry program — they publish maps but inventory layer is token-protected.

name: Dallas, TX
notes: ABSENT. Only finds: Tree_Survey_Map_Eric_Valeriano (Austin CC student survey, 36 trees in central Dallas) — not a city inventory. City of Dallas does not publish a tree inventory on AGOL.

name: Jacksonville, FL
notes: ABSENT for Jacksonville, FL. AGOL TreeInventory (owner=sla100) is actually JACKSONVILLE, ILLINOIS (geometry-sampled at 39.74N, -90.22W — IL StarHill Forest Rotary project, 2,626 + 2,530 trees split across 7 layers). City of Jacksonville, FL does not publish a tree inventory on AGOL.

name: Fort Worth, TX
notes: ABSENT. 0 tree-inventory candidates in AGOL searches. owner:FortWorthTX_GIS returns 0 tree items. City of Fort Worth does not publish tree-point data on AGOL.

name: Austin, TX
notes: Round D import 2026-05-11. Austin PARD (Parks & Recreation Department) Tree Inventory ~51k trees, SCIENTIFIC_NAME + SPECIES_NAME + TREE_CODE (iTree). Older 'dryad-trees-austin' was claimed in tracker but never actually imported (not in dryad-city-trees.ts source list); replaced by this. 11,507 pins after forageable filter.

name: Charlotte, NC
notes: IMPORTED. Charlotte Landscape Management (LSM) Trees on the city's own ArcGIS Server (not AGOL) — owner=CharlotteNC, snippet 'Landscape Management Active trees replicated from AMS.' 191,909 trees with Common, DBH, Active, Location. Common is modifier-first with colon or space separator ('OAK: WILLOW', 'CRAPEMYRTLE SPP'). 'SPP' / slash entries are too vague and are skipped. City of Charlotte Open Data Portal default-permissive.

name: Indianapolis, IN
notes: ALREADY-DONE via IN state aggregator (IU Environmental Resilience Institute). Indianapolis bbox query returns 191,371 trees within the merged IN feed (Bloomington+Indianapolis+18 more cities). Phase 4 import of IN aggregator covers this city.

name: El Paso, TX
notes: ABSENT. 0 tree-inventory candidates in AGOL searches. owner:ElPasoTX returns 0. No public inventory.

name: Detroit, MI
notes: PARTIAL via dryad-trees-detroit (4,051 pins in bbox, 13% of expected). City of Detroit's own AGOL publishes only FinalTreePoints (LiDAR canopy detection by nv5.com contractor — no species, just heights) and Projected_Tree_Removals (planned removals, not standing trees). Phase 3 outreach for a city-managed per-tree species inventory if one exists internally.

name: Memphis, TN
notes: ABSENT. Only finds: Memphis 'Shade from Trees' tile MapService (Kameron_Hall, canopy heat layer) + Collierville 2012 canopy. No tree-point inventory on AGOL.

name: Milwaukee, WI
notes: ALREADY-DONE via WI DNR Community Trees aggregator. Milwaukee bbox query returns 239,976 pins (832% of ~28,850 expected). Aggregator already covers comprehensively.

name: Tucson, AZ
notes: ABSENT (citywide). City of Tucson (owner=tucsondata_cotgis) publishes Tree Equity Scores (block-group polygons) — no per-tree point inventory. TFT Tree Inventory (Tucson Clean & Beautiful) has only 104 trees from a 2020 project. Tucson Birds 270-tree health survey (NPS Saguaro) — not citywide. No citywide street-tree point layer on AGOL.

name: Fresno, CA
notes: ABSENT. AGOL finds only canopy polygons (USDA Fresno Tree Canopy, raster-derived) and a CDFW Tree Squirrel hunt zone (unrelated). No tree-point inventory.

name: Atlanta, GA
notes: IMPORTED. Trees Atlanta non-profit public inventory (owner=Data_TA, AGOL Public). 121,316 trees planted since 1985, separate Genus + Species + Cultivar fields. Snippet describes data as 'public-facing data about plants … used in the public tree inventory map viewable on the TA website'. City of Atlanta's own GIS publishes no street-tree-point inventory. Combined with the existing dryad-trees-atlanta partial: ~36k pins in bbox = 146% of expected.

name: Mesa, AZ
notes: READY. Mesa AZ iTree Inventory (owner=MesaAz). 33,311 trees with Species_Name (Latin), BOTANICAL_NAME, COMMON_NAME, DBH, iTree benefit fields. Point geom inside Mesa bbox.

name: Kansas City, MO
notes: ABSENT. Top hits: Tree_Viewer1 (owner=gis_lawrenceks — Lawrence KS, 16,720 trees, wrong city, ~70 mi west); Street_Trees Public (owner=rjlanzrath, 2,844 trees but geometry samples in WICHITA KS, not KC). Kansas City, MO does not publish tree inventory on AGOL.

name: Raleigh, NC
notes: READY. Raleigh PRCR Urban Forestry Trees Open Data (owner=RaleighPRCR). 207,491 trees. Public-facing open-data layer (companion edit layer PRCR_Urban_Forestry_Trees has 237,130 incl in-flight edits — prefer Open_Data view). Fields: STREET, SPP_CODE, DIAMETER, PARKID. SPP_CODE is short code — Phase 4 will need species code-table lookup.

name: Omaha, NE
notes: ABSENT. Only Corridor_Boundaries_gdb (owner=JEChezem_omaha) — boundary polygons, not trees. No tree-point inventory found.

name: Miami, FL
notes: ABSENT. Miami-Dade TreeInventory11032018 (owner=e26723@miamidade.gov_MDC) is a TABLE not Feature Layer, only 145 rows. Other hits: Adopt-A-Tree event signups (non-inventory). UM_CoralGables tree canopy raster. No usable street-tree inventory.

name: Virginia Beach, VA
notes: ABSENT. AGOL only returns Prince William County iTree analysis (unrelated). No Virginia Beach tree inventory.

name: Bakersfield, CA
notes: ABSENT. Only finds: CSUB Geocoding_AC_Locations and Riverwalk_Park (very small student-survey layers). No city inventory.

name: Tulsa, OK
notes: READY. City of Tulsa FieldMaps Trees layer. 9,627 trees with Genus/Species/CommonName/DBH/ParkName. Point geometry, geometry-sampled inside Tulsa bbox. Note: served via utility.arcgis.com proxy — Phase 4 should confirm pagination.

name: Wichita, KS
notes: ABSENT. Only finds: WichitaUrbanTreeCanopy2017 tile MapService (raster canopy). No tree-point inventory. Note: rjlanzrath 'Street_Trees Public' (2,844 trees) likely IS in Wichita but is owned by a private user with no metadata; Phase 3 could investigate.

name: Cleveland, OH
notes: ABSENT. Citywide Property Survey 2022 (owner=opendataCLE) is a vacant-parcel survey, not tree data. No tree-point inventory.

name: New Orleans, LA
notes: READY. NOLA_TreeInventory (owner=LawrenceGWMKE, Greater Water MKE). 106,820 trees with TREE_ID, COMMON, BOTANICAL, LAT, LONG. Point geometry, public AGOL. Geometry-sampled inside NOLA bbox.

name: Henderson, NV
notes: ABSENT (point inventory). NDF 2022 Henderson Urban Tree Canopy is a canopy raster/polygon, not per-tree. No point inventory. (Henderson has only 1340 Henderson Hwy 83-tree survey — a single street.)

name: Orlando, FL
notes: ABSENT. 0 tree-inventory candidates.

name: Lexington, KY
notes: ABSENT (citywide). Waverly Park 2022 Tree Inventory (UFI_UKY) covers only 64 park trees. Tree Canopy 1998 (gis_lfucg) is canopy polygons. KY state aggregator Tree_Inventory11 includes ~347 trees within Lexington bbox but is statewide Adopt-A-Tree submissions, not citywide. No comprehensive Lexington street-tree inventory.

name: Riverside, CA
notes: READY. Riverside opendata (owner=rivopendata_admin) publishes 3 layers: Street_Trees (127,750) + Trees_Along_Utility_Lines (49,020) + Miscellaneous_Trees (686). All have BotanicalName/CommonName/DBH; point geom; in-bbox. Phase 4 should ingest all 3 (combined 177,456).

name: Irvine, CA
notes: ABSENT. Only CALFIRE Goldspotted Oak Borer BLITZ results (statewide pest survey). No Irvine inventory.

name: Corpus Christi, TX
notes: ABSENT. 0 tree-inventory candidates.

name: Newark, NJ
notes: ABSENT (existing trees). TNC Newark Tree Planting Sites Survey123 (1,159 sites) lists planting SITES not existing trees — Tree_Species field is 'NA' for all sampled rows. Urban Forest Management Plan Survey is community survey, not inventory.

name: Santa Ana, CA
notes: ABSENT. Only SantaAna_2011_trees_clip (owner=ex_files, 14-year-old academic clip with no docs) — appears non-canonical, no contact info.

name: Cincinnati, OH
notes: READY. Cincinnati Park Board Tree Inventory March 2020 (owner=parks_cbelcher). 34,296 trees with FAMILY/SPECIES/CULTIVAR/COMMON_NAME, DBH, COMMUNITY, STREET, iTree benefits. Point geom inside Cincinnati bbox. Note: streettreecincy_public is an empty editor view, ignore.

name: Saint Paul, MN
notes: PARTIAL READY. Saint Paul Bikeway Feasibility Study Tree Inventory (owner=dtinklenberg, consultant). 3,788 trees with Species (full Latin+common), DBH, address. Only covers bikeway-corridor trees — NOT citywide. Phase 4 import as supplemental; outreach (Phase 3) for full Saint Paul Parks & Rec citywide inventory recommended.

name: Jersey City, NJ
notes: READY. City of Jersey City Tree Inventory Dashboard 2023 (owner=EGuseman_JC). 18,011 trees with species (Latin), DBH, condition, address, ward. Point geom inside Jersey City bbox.

name: Lincoln, NE
notes: READY. City of Lincoln Parks/Trees MapServer (gis.lincoln.ne.gov). 144,918 trees with ScientificName/CommonName/iTreeCode/DBH. Point geometry, in-bbox. Public ArcGIS Server (no token). Includes street+park trees.

name: North Las Vegas, NV
notes: ABSENT (point inventory). NDF 2022 North Las Vegas Urban Tree Canopy is canopy raster, not per-tree.

name: Plano, TX
notes: ABSENT. Plano Trees_PublicView FeatureServer/13 has 5,594 rows but only OBJECTID+GlobalID fields (no species), and geometry sits in EPSG:3435 IL state plane (renders ~Naperville IL coords). Layer is unusable.

name: Anchorage, AK
notes: ABSENT. Only Urban_Forest_Park_Map_WFL1 (UAA Geomatics student project, small). No municipal Anchorage inventory.

name: Gilbert, AZ
notes: ABSENT. Gilbert_Tree_Inventory_WFL1 (owner=mkgilber_LUGDC, Lakehead Univ student project) has 15 trees in Thunder Bay, ON (geom 48.35N, -89.33W) — not Arizona. No Gilbert AZ inventory.

name: Reno, NV
notes: ABSENT (point inventory). NDF 2022 Reno Urban Tree Canopy is canopy raster, not per-tree. No Reno point inventory.

name: Chandler, AZ
notes: ABSENT. 0 tree-inventory candidates.

name: Chula Vista, CA
notes: ABSENT. 0 tree-inventory candidates.

name: Fort Wayne, IN
notes: ALREADY-DONE via IN state aggregator. Fort Wayne bbox query returns 48,239 trees within the merged IN feed. Phase 4 import of IN aggregator covers this city.

name: Lubbock, TX
notes: ABSENT. Only TTU_Vegetation_Inventory (owner=lionelplummer, Texas Tech campus, small). No city inventory.

name: St. Petersburg, FL
notes: ABSENT. Search returns Petersburg ILLINOIS Street Trees 2008 (StarhillForest) — wrong city. No St. Petersburg FL inventory.

name: Toledo, OH
notes: ABSENT (point inventory). Only Toledo Urban Forestry Front Footage Model (owner=dibonamj, parcel-level frontage estimate, not trees) + city's tile Tree_Canopy raster. No per-tree inventory.

name: Laredo, TX
notes: ABSENT. 0 tree-inventory candidates.

name: Glendale, AZ
notes: ABSENT. Only ASU USDA Urban Forestry Planning_WFL1 (planning polygons, no per-tree data). No Glendale AZ inventory.

name: Irving, TX
notes: ABSENT. Only Spring 2024 Tree Inventory - Irving Park (40 rows, Kellogg CC student project, refers to a park in Battle Creek MI named 'Irving Park'). Not Irving TX.

name: Winston-Salem, NC
notes: ABSENT. Only Wake Forest Univ student survey form (13 + 16 rows of native/invasive plants — not a city inventory).

name: Chesapeake, VA
notes: ABSENT. AGOL search returned Salisbury MD canopy layers, Baltimore forest patches, and Hamburg PA (emrubin_COHBG, City of Hamburg, owner appears to be West Chester PA-area planner) Street Trees — all wrong cities. No Chesapeake VA tree inventory.

name: Richmond, VA
notes: Round D import 2026-05-11. AGOL FeatureServer owned by brad.duplantis@rva.gov_cor (City of Richmond). 121,645 total rows, filtered to 75,769 live trees (Status='In Service' minus Vacant/Stump/Unknown/Grass/Bamboo/Cactus). 28,138 imported pins after forageable filter.

name: Salt Lake City, UT
notes: IMPORTED. SLC Public Lands Urban Forestry Inventory (owner=brandon.fleming_slcgov, AGOL Public, 110,292 trees) with full Latin binomial in SPP, DBH, address. State-level UT FFSL aggregator had only ~800 SLC pins (8% coverage); city's own feed is 10x more complete and authoritative. Combined ~54k pins in bbox = 541% of expected (street + park trees inflate the per-capita estimate).

name: Des Moines, IA
notes: City of Des Moines (City_Des_Moines AGOL org) publishes ~320 datasets but no tree-point inventory. IA DNR state aggregator has only 1,124 DSM pins (10% of ~10,750 expected). Dryad already covers historical inventory; no live city feed to add.

name: Tallahassee, FL
notes: Round D import 2026-05-11. City of Tallahassee Cityworks tree inventory ~57.9k trees, hosted on Tallahassee-Leon County GIS Office server. BOTANICAL (Latin) + COMMON. LIFECYCLE='Active' or null both kept. 5,704 pins after forageable filter.

name: Newport News, VA
notes: Round D 2026-05-11. Public view layer for City of Newport News tree inventory (~914 trees). Full Cityworks-backed Trees_Not_Public_View layer exists but returns 0 rows for anonymous callers; only the curated public view is exposed. genus + species + commonname. 216 pins after forageable filter. Phase 3 outreach to expand: ask City GIS for non-public view access if/when relevant.

name: Eugene, OR
notes: City of Eugene Parks & Open Space tree inventory (~88k live trees; 111k total incl planting sites & stumps). Backing service for the public 'City of Eugene Urban Forest' web app (item 8c2c6e0c, owner=City_of_Eugene). Tree_species field uses 'Genus species - common name' format. Scope: parks & open space only (not ROW street trees). Round C 2026-05-10 import: 29,365 pins created (forageable species only).

name: Gainesville, FL
notes: Round B 2026-05-11: No City of Gainesville street tree inventory feature service found. Only UF campus parcels (MichaelKE TreeAssessment items) and miscellaneous canopy rasters; no point-level municipal inventory.

name: Cedar Rapids, IA
notes: ALREADY-DONE via IA DNR state aggregator. Cedar Rapids bbox query returns 4,864 trees (71% of ~6,850 expected for 137k pop). Coverage above 50% threshold; not duplicating with a city-owned feed.

name: New Haven, CT
notes: New Haven street tree inventory (~32k trees) maintained by Yale Urban Resources Initiative (URI) in partnership with New Haven Parks & Rec. AGOL item ac8d16bb874c41118c0550f2daff87dd, public access, license field 'None' but openly published — treat as public-with-attribution. Schema: COMM_NAME + Genus + Species + Family + Cultivar. Round B import 2026-05-11: 6,903 pins created.

name: Athens, GA
notes: Round B 2026-05-11: Athens-Clarke County Unified Government has an open-data hub at accgov-acc.opendata.arcgis.com but no street tree inventory dataset; UGA campus has separate tree records via Adam.Ghafourian@uga.edu but no public-tier feature service. No usable city-wide inventory feed found.

name: Ann Arbor, MI
notes: City of Ann Arbor Public Services Forestry tree inventory (~60k trees). BOTANICAL holds Latin binomial, COMMONNAME holds comma-modifier common name. Hosted on City's own ArcGIS Server (a2mapscw.a2gov.org). AGOL item ea2d448f87044e56b3d709b1953eeb16, public access, no explicit license string — treated as public-with-attribution per City publication. Round B import 2026-05-11: 39,841 pins created.

name: Berkeley, CA
notes: City of Berkeley Parks, Recreation & Waterfront urban forest inventory (~47k trees, Arborwell-compiled 2013). Canonical Tree Inventory is WFS-only (item 466f801df34e4e85ae416dbf57906a99); Trees_Test FeatureServer (item 5982db9c6ba84d60835e3f6a188cca9c) is the public anonymously-queryable replica. Schema has TREE_NAME (common) + iTREE_CODE; no Latin binomial. AGOL items public access, no explicit license — treated as public-with-attribution. Round B import 2026-05-11: 7,625 pins created.

name: Evansville, IN
notes: ALREADY-DONE via IN state aggregator. Evansville bbox query returns 8,203 trees (143% of ~5,750 expected for 115k pop).

name: Boulder, CO
notes: City of Boulder Parks & Recreation tree inventory (~50k trees). LATINNAME (binomial without cultivar) + COMMONNAME (comma-modifier form). AGOL item dbbae8bdb0a44d17934243b88e85ef2b explicitly licensed CC0 1.0 (public domain). Round B import 2026-05-11: 35,814 pins created.

name: Green Bay, WI
notes: ALREADY-DONE via WI DNR Community Trees aggregator. Green Bay bbox query returns 45,230 pins (845% of ~5,350 expected).

name: Fishers, IN
notes: IN state aggregator covers Fishers at 46% of expected (2,265 pins). City GIS at maps.fishers.in.us publishes only a polygon Fishers_Tree_Canopy layer (raster), no point inventory. No municipal tree-point feed available; rely on IN aggregator coverage.

name: South Bend, IN
notes: IN state aggregator has 0 South Bend pins. City's maps.southbendin.gov publishes 'ForestryJobCards_View' (crew-work logs, not inventory — no species field). No municipal tree-point inventory available.

name: Carmel, IN
notes: ALREADY-DONE via IN state aggregator. Carmel bbox query returns 19,768 trees (380% of ~5,200 expected for 104k pop) — wealthy suburb with aggressive ROW tree planting.

name: Davenport, IA
notes: IA DNR state aggregator has only 82 Davenport pins (2% of ~5,050 expected). City of Davenport runs gis.davenportiowa.com but Parks_and_Rec service has no tree layer; archived AGOL tree items (jbowles_MyAGO) are disabled. No live municipal tree feed available.

name: Iowa City, IA
notes: Phase 4 import. IA DNR state aggregator had only 269 Iowa City pins (~7% coverage). City Parks & Rec Tree Plotter feed has 45,376 trees with LatinName + CommonName; imported 27,354 matched pins (11,646 unmatched species).

name: Ames, IA
notes: Phase 4 import. IA DNR state aggregator had only 539 Ames pins (~17%). City of Ames Forestry maintains ~23k SPCODE-only inventory on gis.cityofames.org (same coded-value scheme as IA DNR). Imported 12,999 matched + 1 updated; 5,393 unmatched. 2 batch-level dedupe errors lost ~1,000 rows on duplicate TREEIDs.

name: Waterloo, IA
notes: IA DNR state aggregator has 1,305 Waterloo pins (39% of ~3,350 expected). No public city GIS REST endpoint found on cityofwaterloo.com or alternate hosts. Falls below 50% but no city-owned feed available.

name: Sioux City, IA
notes: ALREADY-DONE via IA DNR state aggregator. Sioux City bbox query returns 5,840 trees (142% of ~4,100 expected for 82k pop). Above 50% threshold; aggregator coverage is sufficient.

name: Beverly Hills, CA
notes: Below Wikipedia 100k threshold; included because of existing direct import.

notes: Below Wikipedia 100k threshold; included because of existing direct import.

notes: Below Wikipedia 100k threshold; included because of existing direct import.

notes: Below Wikipedia 100k threshold; included because of existing direct import.

notes: Below Wikipedia 100k threshold; included because of existing direct import.

name: Longueuil, QC
notes: Below Wikipedia 100k threshold; included because of existing direct import.

name: Hillsborough County, FL
notes: Round D import 2026-05-11. County Park Trees inventory ~10.9k (snapshot 2021-01-27). Scientific + CommonName. 225 pins after forageable filter.

name: Ontario Ministry of Natural Resources and Forestry
notes: No Ontario MNRF community-tree aggregator found. Top results are Lakehead University student-project tree inventories near Thunder Bay (~10 trees each).

name: Quebec Ministère des Forêts, de la Faune et des Parcs
notes: No Quebec province-level tree aggregator found on ArcGIS Online.

name: British Columbia Ministry of Forests
notes: No BC Ministry of Forests urban-tree aggregator found. District of North Vancouver StreetTrees (192) was top hit, city-level.

name: Alberta Forestry and Parks
notes: No Alberta-level community tree aggregator found. Selkirk MB Street Tree Planting Priority and Strathcona County TIMS are top hits, both local and POLYLINE (street segments, not tree points).

name: Saskatchewan Ministry of Environment — Forest Service
notes: No Saskatchewan province aggregator found. Weyburn city (7,969) is largest SK tree-point find.

name: Manitoba Sustainable Development — Forestry
notes: No Manitoba province aggregator found on ArcGIS Online.

name: Nova Scotia Department of Natural Resources and Renewables
notes: No Nova Scotia province aggregator found.

name: New Brunswick Department of Natural Resources and Energy Development
notes: NB has "South Central Peninsula Tree Inventory 2017" (2,621 trees) + "Lower West Side Tree Inventory 2018" (379) from ACAP Saint John — city-level inventories, not provincial. No NB DNR state-level aggregator. Village of New Maryland NB also has 574 tree points.

name: Newfoundland and Labrador Department of Fisheries, Forestry and Agriculture
notes: No Newfoundland/Labrador province aggregator found.

name: Prince Edward Island Forests, Fish and Wildlife Division
notes: No PEI province community-tree aggregator found.

notes: Imported via OpenTrees aggregator

name: Kenosha, WI
notes: ALREADY-DONE via WI DNR aggregator. Kenosha bbox returns 22,715 pins (454% of ~5,000 expected).

name: Racine, WI
notes: ALREADY-DONE via WI DNR aggregator. Racine bbox returns 18,300 pins (475% of ~3,850 expected).

name: Appleton, WI
notes: ALREADY-DONE via WI DNR aggregator. Appleton bbox returns 32,996 pins (880% of ~3,750 expected).

name: Eau Claire, WI
notes: ALREADY-DONE via WI DNR aggregator. Eau Claire bbox returns 21,733 pins (630% of ~3,450 expected).

name: Oshkosh, WI
notes: ALREADY-DONE via WI DNR aggregator. Oshkosh bbox returns 7,261 pins (220% of ~3,300 expected).

name: Burlington, VT
notes: ALREADY-DONE via VT ANR aggregator. Burlington bbox returns 1,160 pins (53% of ~2,200 expected); just above the 50% threshold so not separately importing the city feed.

name: Essex, VT
notes: ALREADY-DONE via VT ANR aggregator. Essex bbox returns 1,086 pins (99% of ~1,100 expected).

name: South Burlington, VT
notes: ALREADY-DONE via VT ANR aggregator. South Burlington bbox returns 1,811 pins (181% of ~1,000 expected).

name: Colchester, VT
notes: ALREADY-DONE via VT ANR aggregator. Colchester bbox returns 1,539 pins (181% of ~850 expected).

name: Rutland, VT
notes: ALREADY-DONE via VT ANR aggregator. Rutland bbox returns 824 pins (110% of ~750 expected).

name: Princeton, NJ
notes: Round C 2026-05-10: PrincetonNJ AGOL org has no tree inventory layers. AGOL search returns only Princeton Theological Seminary (~140 trees, bbox -74.67/40.34) and Princeton Cemetery — both campus/grounds scale, not a town street-tree inventory. Marquand Park has a 2014 inventory in a Web Mapping Application (no feature service). Town of Princeton does not publish a street tree inventory.

name: Hanover, NH
notes: Round C 2026-05-10: 'Dartmouth College Arboretum of Northern Trees' Feature Service (owner=richardmaxwell@tremap.com, tremap commercial mapper) — token-required, not public. Town of Hanover does not publish a separate municipal street-tree feed. VT ANR aggregator covers part of Upper Valley but returns only 65 pins in the Hanover bbox. Phase-3 outreach: tremap.com for Dartmouth arboretum access, Town of Hanover DPW for a town inventory.

name: Northampton, MA
notes: Round C 2026-05-10: No City of Northampton ArcGIS org or open-data hub found. AGOL searches return only Pioneer Valley PVPC stormwater layers and a Smith College Tree Inequity StoryMap (no underlying point service). No municipal tree-point inventory exists publicly.

name: Amherst, MA
notes: Round C 2026-05-10: amherstmaps AGOL org publishes a 'Street Trees' Feature Service (item b4a74ab2) hosted on gis.amherstma.gov — but the city's ArcGIS Server is behind Cloudflare and returns a JS challenge for any non-browser request, blocking programmatic harvest. Also have a Web Map 'Amherst MA Inventoried Trees' (87de3928). Phase-3 outreach: Amherst Town GIS for direct data dump or Cloudflare bypass.

name: Chapel Hill, NC
notes: Round C 2026-05-10: No Town of Chapel Hill or Orange County NC tree-inventory feature service found. AGOL searches in the Chapel Hill bbox return no street tree layers. Only Coker Arboretum at UNC has anecdotal data. Town does not publish a public street tree inventory.

name: Davis, CA
notes: Round C 2026-05-10: City of Davis AGOL items (holly.knox_DRG_GIS / Davey Resource Group) include CanopyROW polygons and EmeraldNecklace, but no point-level street tree inventory. UC Davis Arboretum has separate data (university tier). City of Davis itself does not publish a public street-tree feed.

name: Logan, UT
notes: Round C 2026-05-10: Utah FFSL state aggregator only includes 39 pins in the Logan bbox (well below the ~2,600 threshold for >50% coverage of a 52k city). No Logan-specific AGOL inventory or City of Logan tree feed found. USU campus is separate (university tier).

name: Champaign-Urbana, IL
notes: Round C 2026-05-10: Already covered via opentrees-champaign_il (9,002 pins in bbox — well above the 6,250 threshold for >50% coverage of 125k combined population). Skip.

name: Bloomington, IN
notes: Round C 2026-05-10: Already covered via Indiana DNR aggregator (23,017 pins in Bloomington bbox). Skip per pre-flight guidance.

name: Sarasota County, FL
notes: Round D import 2026-05-11. County tree inventory ~60k on county-managed land (parks, ROW, county facilities). genusname (title-cased Latin) + commonname; existstatus='In Place' or null both kept. 480 pins after forageable filter — low match rate because most Florida-zone species (Sabal palmetto, Quercus virginiana, etc.) are not in JK's forageable catalog.

name: Leon County, FL
notes: Round D import 2026-05-11. Leon County Canopy Roads inventory (~5.7k trees along the historic oak-canopied scenic roadways in/around Tallahassee). BOTANICAL + COMMON. 350 pins after forageable filter. NB: a separate Heritage Live Oak inventory item (TLCGIS_FL/Herritage Live Oak Inventory) exists and is much smaller — not separately imported.

name: Yale University
notes: Round D import 2026-05-11. Yale Office of Facilities inventory (~7.9k trees) on Yale-owned New Haven properties. tree_id_species uses USDA NRCS PLANTS short codes (FAGR, PRSE2, etc.); the field's coded-value domain carries '<common> ( <latin> )' resolution which we parse at import. 4,959 pins after forageable filter. Pins land in the existing 'New Haven public' region alongside the new-haven-uri-trees source — different curatorial scopes.

name: Smith College Botanic Garden
notes: Round D import 2026-05-11. Smith College Botanic Garden arboretum accessions (~1.2k LifeForm=Tree). TaxonName carries Latin + cultivar; framework normalizeSpeciesName strips the cultivar marker so it falls back to the binomial. 395 pins after forageable filter. Snapshot dated November 2019 per service name. New 'Northampton public' region created.

name: Duke University
notes: Round D import 2026-05-11. Duke Facilities Management campus tree inventory (~17.8k trees across West/East/Central campuses + Sarah P. Duke Gardens). GenSpe (Latin binomial) + ComName + genus/species split. TreeRemoved='Yes' filtered out. 5,020 pins after forageable filter. New 'Durham NC public' region.

name: Stanford University campus
notes: Round D import 2026-05-11. Curated edible-yield subset (Fruit or Nut category) of the Stanford campus tree inventory. Parent Stanford_Trees_All / Stanford_Trees_Inedible items exist but the Edible view is the public layer. BOTANICAL + SCIENTIFIC + COMMON. 1,052 pins after forageable filter (high match rate — every row is pre-curated as edible). New 'Stanford public' region.

name: Weaverville, NC
notes: Round D import 2026-05-11. Town of Weaverville (Buncombe County, north of Asheville) tree inventory ~960. Botanical + Common. 511 pins after forageable filter. New 'Weaverville public' region.

name: Gaithersburg, MD
notes: Round D import 2026-05-11. City of Gaithersburg street trees (~11.5k). Botanical_Name + Common_Name. 5,666 pins after forageable filter. New 'Gaithersburg public' region.

name: Wellesley, MA
notes: Round D import 2026-05-11. Town of Wellesley public shade trees (~7.7k, Status='Existing' filter). ScientificName + CommonName (comma-modifier format, reordered). 5,825 pins after forageable filter. New 'Wellesley public' region.

name: Arlington, MA
notes: Round D import 2026-05-11. Town of Arlington MA public shade trees (~11.3k, RemovedDate IS NULL filter). Genus + Species (separate) + CommonName. 9,235 pins after forageable filter. New 'Arlington MA public' region (disambiguated from Arlington VA/TX).

name: Watertown, WI
notes: Round D import 2026-05-11. City of Watertown WI tree maintenance join (~11.3k, YearRemoved IS NULL filter). Genus + Species + CommonName + Variety. 5,949 pins after forageable filter. Initially mis-targeted as Watertown MA during AGOL search; bbox check revealed actual data is in WI (43.19 N, -88.72 W) — region renamed accordingly. Watertown MA has no public AGOL feed; uses MapGeo commercial viewer (Phase 3 outreach).

name: Bates College
notes: Round D import 2026-05-11. 'Trees of Bates' campus inventory (~512 trees in Lewiston, ME). Genus + species + Common_nam + Family + educational metadata. 380 pins after forageable filter. New 'Lewiston public' region.

name: Allen, TX (refresh)
notes: Round D import 2026-05-11. City of Allen, TX tree inventory (~10.8k, LifeCycleStatus='Active' filter). CommonScientificName parsed from 'Common (Latin)' format with comma-modifier reorder. 2,560 pins after forageable filter. The original Round B tracker entry noted ~10.8k was 'city-level Allen' — this is the import. New 'Allen TX public' region.

name: Richardson, TX (refresh)
notes: Round D import 2026-05-11. Note: Richardson TX is ALSO in opentrees-richardson (already imported). This adds the current CityWorks-backed MapServer feed (~4.5k) for live updates; opentrees snapshot is older. GENUS (SPECIES often null) + NAME. 1,954 pins after forageable filter. New 'Richardson public' region.

name: Wichita, KS (refresh)
notes: Round D import 2026-05-11. The Round A tracker noted only canopy raster data for Wichita; this AGOL item (owned by Cityworks integrator account rjlanzrath) is in fact Wichita KS street trees per bbox spot-check (~37.7 N, -97.1 W). GENUS + SPECIES (often null) + NAME. 368 pins after forageable filter. Initially targeted as 'Kansas City public' region in script — corrected to 'Wichita public' after bbox verification.

name: Lawrence, KS
notes: Round D import 2026-05-11. City of Lawrence KS Tree Viewer (~16.7k total; 12.2k with non-null speciesid). Field uses coded-value codes (SPP-1, ...) whose domain carries common name + optional cultivar (we strip cultivars and reorder comma-modifiers). Latin not exposed; matches via common name only. 6,817 pins after forageable filter. New 'Lawrence KS public' region.

name: Chicago Region Trees Initiative (CRTI) / Morton Arboretum
notes: Round D 2026-05-11 investigation: CRTI / Morton Arboretum (owner ldarling_MortonArb) publishes Hub Site Apps + Web Maps for canopy POLYGONS (CRTI Priority Areas, Tree Equity Score viewer, Witness Trees historic, CRTI Priority Layers). NO point-level tree inventory aggregator exists. Per-municipality point inventories are published independently (e.g., Naperville already imported via opentrees-naperville_il). Not actionable as an aggregator import.

name: Pinellas County, FL
notes: Round D 2026-05-11: Pinellas County Tree Inventory (~52.9k trees). SPECIES field uses USDA PLANTS short codes (QUVI, JAMI, etc.) with a 509-entry coded-value domain carrying COMMON names only (no Latin). Common-name matching against our catalog produces low match rates because the Florida-specific tropical/palm species are largely absent from our forageable list. Phase 3 outreach for a Latin-name mapping is possible but not high-priority. Marked absent for now (not imported); endpoint preserved for future re-evaluation.

name: Harrisburg, PA
notes: Round D 2026-05-11: Harrisburg PA Corrected 2018 Tree Layer (~8.6k). Species field uses USDA NRCS short codes (TIEU, CABE, etc.) with NO coded-value domain — codes cannot be resolved to common or Latin names from the layer metadata. Phase 3 outreach to Harrisburg GIS for a code mapping. Not imported.

name: Manchester, NH
notes: Round D 2026-05-11: Manchester NH Parks & Rec Trees 2022 (item 880d1fd2f9404a0381814565f5ee4cd7). Hosted on Kimley-Horn consulting server; REST endpoint requires a token (HTTP 499 Token Required). Phase 3 outreach to Manchester DPW or Kimley-Horn for anonymous access or a CSV export.

name: Lowell, MA
notes: Round D 2026-05-11: Two Lowell MA layers found: (a) UMass Lowell Urban Forest Survey123 fieldworker layer (operation not supported for anonymous query) — gated, and (b) Tree_Inventory_Lowell hosted feature service — returns 'Token Required' (HTTP 499). Both gated. Phase 3 outreach to Weston & Sampson or UMass Lowell.

name: Asheville, NC
notes: Round D 2026-05-11: No public point-level tree inventory found for City of Asheville. AGOL hits return Buncombe County canopy raster (patrickgberger), Heat Vulnerability Index polygons, and student-project layers. Only Asheville-area point data is small academic surveys. The City of Asheville org (avl) does not publish a tree feed. Weaverville (neighboring small town) imported separately.

name: Roanoke, VA
notes: Round D 2026-05-11: Roanoke_Trees_3D dataset exists (36,778 points) but is a 3D visualization layer with Z/Height/Slope/Accumulation columns — no Genus/Species/CommonName fields, just generic 'Name'. Not usable as a tree-species inventory.

name: Norfolk, VA (refresh)
notes: Round D 2026-05-11: No public Norfolk VA tree inventory on AGOL. Only related hits are ODU sea-level rise marsh models and Norfolk Island-tree document references. Phase 3 outreach to Norfolk DPW Urban Forestry.

name: Texas A&M Forest Service / MyCityTrees
notes: Round D 2026-05-11: MyCityTrees aggregator (mct.tfs.tamu.edu) is a Nuxt SPA with all data behind login. Phase 3 outreach to Texas A&M Forest Service to request a public-data export or per-city CSV. Individual TX city inventories must be sourced independently (Houston, Austin PARD, Allen, Richardson all imported separately; San Antonio, Fort Worth, Plano, Frisco, El Paso, Garland, Irving, McKinney, Mesquite, Carrollton, Lewisville, Denton, Tyler, Lubbock, Amarillo, Wichita Falls, Beaumont — no current public AGOL feed found in Round D triage).

name: ArborScope (Bartlett Tree Experts)
notes: Round D 2026-05-11: ArborScope is Bartlett Tree Experts' commercial viewer. UChicago campus (08C5C2C7) and UIC campus (06CFC4C6) are inventories accessed through this. generatePoints.cfm endpoint needs form-serialized state and scraping would violate TOS. Phase 3 outreach to UChicago Facilities + UIC Facilities directly for raw exports. Do not scrape.
